text:
The Moritonio Troupe (, Moritonio Ichiza) is a traveling performance troupe. Hunter × Hunter: Hisoka's Past (One-Shot) 

Overview

The Moritonio Troupe is a performance troupe whose goal was to make a breakthrough and become famous in Glam Gas Land. 

Plot

Hisoka's Past spin-off

See Hisoka's Past synopsis.
